source: PseudoForge curated report-only direct call-result layout hints

member_paths.note: Observed direct stores through KeGetCurrentPrcb()->MmInternal in ntoskrnl private Memory Manager paths. Do not rewrite without exact KPRCB member layout identity for the target build.

hints.recommended_next: Verify KPRCB return identity and private MmInternal member layout for the target build before any direct +0/member rewrite.
Verify returned registry security-cache layout and argument-specific source identity before any call-result rewrite.
